catalyst.event: BYD Q2 2026 earnings release — first full quarter reflecting price-war exhaustion impact on auto gross margin and the ramp of Yangwang/Denza premium mix; also first quarter with full European CKD plant (Hungary) contribution
catalyst.date_or_window: Late August 2026 (typical BYD H1 reporting window 2026-08-25 to 2026-08-30)
catalyst.source: BYD historical reporting cadence; Hungary plant SOP guidance from FY2025 annual report

rightIf_conditions: Overseas monthly unit sales ≥ 55K by Aug 2026 (vs ~35K monthly run-rate Q1 2026)
Yangwang + Denza + Fangchengbao combined H1 2026 volume ≥ 280K units (>15% of group)
Hungary plant first vehicle off-line by end-September 2026 per current guidance
wrongIf_conditions: Q2 2026 auto gross margin < 18.5% — confirms price-war drag exceeds mix-up offset
Overseas monthly volume falls below 35K for two consecutive months Jun-Jul 2026
Hungary plant SOP delayed beyond Q4 2026 — removes Europe tariff arbitrage catalyst
Premium brand monthly volume (Yangwang+Denza+Fangchengbao) falls below 35K — indicates premium ramp stalling
what_changes_our_mind: Q2 2026 auto gross margin prints below 18.5% (vs our 19.5%+ expectation) AND overseas monthly volume falls below 35K units for two consecutive months in Jun-Jul 2026 — would confirm consensus 'commodity OEM' framing and invalidate mix-shift thesis.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes BYD is a margin-compressed Chinese mass-market OEM stuck at 18x fwd P/E → We believe Q2 2026 will reveal mix-driven margin defense + Hungary SOP unlocking 'global platform' re-rating → Mechanism is premium brands + overseas volume offsetting >60% of domestic price-war GM compression in Q2 print.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +35% to +50% over 6 months (re-rating to 22-24x fwd P/E on FY26E EPS)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -15% to -20% to ~14x fwd P/E floor if Q2 GM disappoints

quantification.metric_target: FY2026E auto gross margin and overseas volume share
quantification.current_value: FY24 auto GM 22.8%; FY25 overseas volume ~420K (~9% share)
quantification.predicted_value: FY26E auto GM 20.5-21.0%; overseas volume 650-720K (~13-14% share)
quantification.predicted_horizon: FY2026 full year, key inflection at Q2 2026 print (Aug 2026)
